subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I testify that every novel mention is prevented from ascending unto the heaven of Thy knowledge, and every [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی اشهد بان کل ذکر بدیع منع عن الارتقاء الی سماء عرفانک و کل
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
